text_original: Can't do unsubscription from "Google Play" which Play Store and Can't do it in the app. Uninstalling
text_zh: 无法在“Google Play”（即Play商店）中取消订阅，在应用内也无法取消。正在卸载。
reply_original: We are sorry to see you go. To cancel: Open Google Play Store -> Tap your profile icon -> Payments & subscriptions -> Subscriptions -> Find Fantasia -> Cancel subscription. If you face any issues, please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID so we can assist you immediately. We hope to see you again!
reply_zh: 很遗憾看到您离开。如需取消：打开 Google Play 商店 -> 点击您的个人资料图标 -> 付款和订阅 -> 订阅 -> 找到 Fantasia -> 取消订阅。如果您遇到任何问题，请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 并附上您的 UID，以便我们能立即为您提供帮助。期待再次见到您！
